title: Dekton 12PC Multi-Purpose Sanding Sheets, 230mm, 4 Each - 40 Grit/Course, 100 Grit/Medium, 150 Grit/Fine | Multi-Surface Use on Wood, Metal, Plaster, Plastics & Paint | Heavy-Duty Sanding Performance
features: Coarse Assorted Grit: The Dekton 12PC Multi-Purpose Sanding Sheets are designed with a smooth grit surface, providing powerful sanding for heavy material removal, making it ideal for tough tasks like paint stripping and smoothing rough surfaces.

Multi-Surface Versatility: These sanding sheets are suitable for use on a wide range of surfaces including wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fiberglass, and painted surfaces, offering flexibility for various projects.

Large 230mm Sheets for Full Coverage: The 230mm size offers extensive coverage, reducing the time spent on large sanding areas. Ideal for use with hand sanders or sanding blocks, ensuring a seamless, uniform finish with each pass.

Versatile Application: Whether you're working on wood, metal, plaster, plastics, or painted surfaces, these multi-purpose sanding sheets are suitable for a variety of tasks. Ideal for smoothing rough edges, refinishing surfaces, or removing stubborn coatings, they are versatile enough for many types of projects.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Manufactured with premium materials, these sanding sheets are built for durability and consistent performance, allowing you to complete your projects with reliable, long-lasting sanding power on demanding tasks.
description: The Dekton 12PC Multi-Purpose Sanding Sheets deliver outstanding performance for various sanding applications. Designed for use on wood, metal, plaster, plastics, and painted surfaces, these sheets offer heavy-duty abrasion with a coarse texture, ideal for removing rust, old paint, and surface imperfections. With a large 230mm size, they provide excellent coverage, reducing work time on larger areas. Crafted from durable materials, these sanding sheets ensure long-lasting use and maintain their effectiveness even under tough conditions. Perfect for both DIY projects and professional use, they guarantee smooth, consistent results for surface preparation, refinishing, or material removal. Whether you're tackling tough jobs or routine maintenance, these versatile sanding sheets are a reliable choice for any workshop or tool kit.
